import os
import json
from functools import lru_cache


@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_database_url() -> str:
    return os.environ["DATABASE_URL"]


@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_api_key() -> str:
    return os.environ.get("API_KEY", "")


@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_config() -> dict:
    with open("config.json") as f:
        return json.load(f)


@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_feature_flags() -> dict:
    return {
        "new_ui": os.environ.get("FEATURE_NEW_UI", "false") == "true",
        "dark_mode": os.environ.get("FEATURE_DARK_MODE", "false") == "true",
    }


def get_connection():
    return connect(get_database_url())
